title: Add Lingua Memory Card to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Lingua Memory Card](https://lingua-memory-card.vercel.app/) to writing
- Lingua Memory Card is a multilingual writing practice app for language learners. Users paste their own practice text, then the app uses Pollinations text models to provide sentence-by-sentence correct

Fixes #11652

gist.headline: Polyglot Pollen
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed! Lingua Memory Card uses our text models to give language learners sentence-by-sentence corrections on their practice writing.
gist.summary: Added Lingua Memory Card, a multilingual writing practice app that uses Pollinations text models for sentence-by-sentence correction, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Language learners can now discover and use this community-built tool to practice writing and get instant AI feedback.
gist.visual_concept: The app is about language learning, writing, and memory cards (flashcards). The bee mascot (Polly) should be studying or holding flashcards with different languages on them in a cozy study setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk studying glowing pixelated flashcards with different language characters on them. A retro computer monitor in the background shows clean text blocks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
